utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format contains 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final plan: it includes all five top-level keys. Next, verify each is fully specified per the format requirement “with costs” or details.
- health_coverage: The format asks for physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan provides physical and mental plans and explicit monthly costs for each. Although it adds extra subitems, costs are present, so this is fully specified.
- property_coverage: The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs. The plan lists EliteHome Premium Coverage and €95/month. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: The format asks for travel insurance with costs. The plan lists PrimeTravel Premium Plan and €115/month. Fully specified.
- additional_services: The format asks for any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists two services with costs (monthly and one-time). Fully specified.
- total_budget: The format asks for complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan includes a monthly breakdown by category, total monthly, total annual, and one-time fees. Fully specified.
All 5/5 items are present and include the required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes the following items that appear in the ground-truth ratings: EliteCare Premium Plan (for physical health and mental health), Preventive Care Package, Family Therapy Coverage, EliteHome Premium Coverage, PrimeTravel Premium Plan, Premium Insurance Membership, and Claims Advocacy Service. I matched each by exact name to the corresponding rating in the provided ground-truth sections.
